message: Setting low asks can lead to trades.
Low asks risk low profits. Suggest we aim for trades around 70 to split surplus fairly over rounds.
Last round no trade. Propose we both target 55 this round for consistent profits. I'll ask 55 if you bid at least 55.
55 is above my limit. I can only trade at lower prices.
Understood, 55 too high. Let's trade at 48 for steady profits. I'll ask 48 if you bid 48. Consistent trades beat none.
Agreed. I will bid 48.

49 is too high. I can only trade at 48. I will bid 48 again. Let's continue trading at 48 for steady profits.
